creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #21)
I do have a fix (bug 215230), may I request for a portmgr@ approval for committing it?

(I assume I could use a maintainer timeout but I realized that it was a self-inflicted wound to myself and I didn't realized that it was due to my sed(1) change).
